test.note: Test suite has 6 pre-existing failures unrelated to closeout service. 968 tests passed. Duplicate export bug in server/src/services/index.ts was fixed during scrutiny.

typecheck.note: Pre-existing type errors in board-claim.ts and workspace-runtime.ts unrelated to closeout service (Drizzle-orm type mismatches)

nonBlockingIssues.description: Git status parsing could be more robust - regex pattern matching for untracked files uses both startsWith and regex match which is slightly redundant
Route uses generic error handling via next(err) - could benefit from more specific error classification

appliedUpdates.description: Removed 6 duplicate exports of closeoutTruthService that were causing esbuild errors
Fixed null-safety bug in parentIssue check - changed 'if (parentIssue)' to 'if (parentIssue?.id)' to prevent path.join error with undefined id

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Promote mission-specific closeout truth conventions from .factory/missions/f07c6cdb-8c66-4cb5-9e4d-fab7fe4c09ab/AGENTS.md to repo-wide AGENTS.md for discoverability. Include: classification states (clean/local/parked/blocked/unknown), priority ordering, and missing data handling rules.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md contains detailed closeout truth documentation not present in repo root AGENTS.md

summary: Milestone server-closeout-service has passed scrutiny validation. The server-closeout-truth-service feature is fully implemented with correct CloseoutTruthService combining mission state, feature graph, validation state, git truth, and explicit classification. All 5 classification states work correctly. API endpoint returns complete payload with proper 404 handling. During scrutiny, 2 bugs were fixed: duplicate exports in index.ts and null-safety in parentIssue check. Tests and typecheck show pre-existing failures unrelated to this milestone (968 tests passed, 6 failed in other areas; Drizzle type errors in board-claim.ts and workspace-runtime.ts).
